criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on various app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, etc.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, etc.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's functionality.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and navigability of the app.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features and bug fixes.
criteria.sources: App store update history, developer announcements

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and performance of the app across different platforms and devices.
